seo.title: A practical case converter for titles, clean copy, and precise edits
paragraphs: QuickTextFormatter is built to satisfy professional formatting requirements, allowing writers, editors, researchers, and developers to clean up titles, headings, and code-based text objects with absolute confidence. Instead of forcing a one-size-fits-all capitalization style onto every block of text, this tool offers dedicated support for AP, Chicago, and traditional title case models alongside standard uppercase, lowercase, camelCase, and sentence case modes. Having access to multiple formats in one browser workspace helps normalize bulk inputs, saving time during content production and editing phases.

Our converter includes advanced settings designed to address real-world copy editing challenges, such as preservation control and conversion scopes. You can configure the tool to skip specific brand names, acronyms, or custom words, ensuring that proprietary terminology remains unchanged. Additionally, using conversion scopes, you can target only selected lines or section markers, allowing you to format headers within a larger markdown or plain text file without affecting the surrounding content.

Complementing the formatting controls is a comprehensive text analytics panel that monitors the structural health of your text. It tracks character counts, word counts, sentence densities, and paragraph structures in real-time, which is essential for meeting strict metadata, social media, or academic copy guidelines. By analyzing unique words and character ratios, users can identify patterns or potential optimization opportunities before finalizing and exporting their copy.

All calculations and transformations are executed entirely within your browser, ensuring maximum privacy and data security. No text is sent to external servers, making it safe to process confidential documents, drafts, or credentials. The tool works seamlessly on all devices and supports direct file uploads, providing a lightweight, robust, and completely free alternative to heavy word processors and desktop formatting software.

faqs.question: What does QuickTextFormatter convert?
faqs.answer: It converts text between title case, sentence case, uppercase, lowercase, and related formatting modes while keeping scope controls available when you only want to change part of a document.

faqs.question: Why use the analytics panel?
faqs.answer: The analytics panel shows character counts, word counts, sentence structure, and other quick summaries so you can check whether your text fits a limit or needs a final edit before export.

faqs.question: Can I protect specific words?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can skip exact words, specific sentence ranges, quoted text, HTML, or words with symbols and numbers, which helps preserve brands, acronyms, and code-like text.

faqs.question: Who is this tool for?
faqs.answer: It is designed for anyone who formats text regularly, including content writers, students, editors, SEO teams, and product managers who want a dependable browser-based case converter.

heroBullets: Professional Title Case Conversion using AP and Chicago standards
Smart Text Analytics for characters, words, sentences, paragraphs, and structure
Identifier-Based & Scoped Conversion to modify only selected portions of text
Selective Rules & Skip Controls for words, sentences, and patterns
Formatting Preservation to protect existing capitalization and structure
Safe, Accurate Transformation—convert exactly what you intend, nothing more

panels.filePlaceholder: Paste your text or upload a Text File...

errors.missingStyle: Select a case mode to convert.
errors.markersMissing: Error: $$$START$$$ and $$$END$$$ markers must both be present.

lineSelection.prompt: Enter line numbers or ranges like 1,2,5-10.
lineSelection.atLeastOne: Enter at least one line number.
lineSelection.positive: Line numbers must be positive. "{{token}}" is invalid.
lineSelection.beyond: Line {{line}} is beyond the text length.
lineSelection.rangeInvalid: Range "{{token}}" is invalid. Use start-end with start <= end.
lineSelection.tokenInvalid: Token "{{token}}" is not a valid line number or range.

scope.title: Scope
scope.identifiersHelp: Converts only the text between $$$START$$$ and $$$END$$$ markers; markers stay intact.
scope.linesHelp: Only these lines will be converted. Invalid references will block conversion with a clear message.

convert.disclaimer: By clicking convert, you agree to the applied settings overriding the current text.

caseModes.title: Case Modes
caseModes.subtitle: Single-select cards; click again to deselect.

titleStyles.label: AP Style (simplified)
titleStyles.detail: BETA: principal words capitalized; short prepositions stay lowercase.
titleStyles.tooltip: Simplified AP rules; results may match Chicago for common phrases.

titleStyles.label: Chicago Style (simplified)
titleStyles.detail: BETA: major words capitalized; minor words stay lowercase.
titleStyles.tooltip: Simplified Chicago rules; often identical to AP on normal text.

genericStyles.label: Sentence case
genericStyles.detail: Capitalize the first word of each sentence; lower the rest.

controls.title: Selective Controls
controls.subtitle: Precedence: Scope → Structure → Skip rules → Apply filters → Convert.

apply.title: Apply Conversion To
apply.hint: Leave all unchecked to convert everything.
apply.accented: Words containing accented letters (examples: é, ñ, ü)
apply.emoji: Words containing emoji/non-Latin characters (examples: 😀, 中文, عربى)

structure.title: Structure Preservation
structure.subtitle: Ignored regions remain untouched before skip/apply rules run.
structure.stopWordsNote: Words stay lowercase unless they are the first or last word in the title segment.

steps.title: Scope Selection
steps.body: Choose to convert the entire text, specific lines, or content wrapped in identifiers like $$$START$$$ and $$$END$$$.

steps.title: Choose Your Style
steps.body: Select from professional title case standards like AP and Chicago, or use simple uppercase, lowercase, and sentence case transformations.

steps.title: Refine with Precision
steps.body: Use selective controls to skip specific words, protect formatted text, or preserve brand capitalization.

styleGuide.label: AP Style:
styleGuide.body: Capitalizes principal words, keeps short prepositions lowercase.

styleGuide.label: Chicago Style:
styleGuide.body: Standard for publishing. Capitalizes major words.

about.title: About QuickTextFormatter
paragraphs: QuickTextFormatter is a case converter built for fast text cleanup, title case formatting, sentence case conversion, and uppercase or lowercase transformations.
Use it when you need to edit text for drafts, academic writing, content preparation, or quick formatting changes without rebuilding your document from scratch.
The tool supports scoped conversion, selective skip rules, and text analytics so you can change only the content you intend to change.
Multilingual support helps the interface work across left-to-right and right-to-left languages, while the clean layout keeps the workflow simple.
If you need help, want to report an issue, or have a feature request, please use the contact page.
about.contactPrompt: if you'd like to ask a question or share a request.

guide.title: Title Case and Formatting Guide
guide.intro: This guide explains how to use the converter for title case, sentence case, uppercase, lowercase, and scoped formatting without changing the text you want to preserve.

sections.heading: 1. Pick the right case style
body: Use AP or Chicago when you want title case behavior for headings, article titles, or content that should look polished and readable.
Use Sentence case for simple paragraph-style text, and switch to uppercase or lowercase when you need a uniform visual treatment.

sections.heading: 2. Set the conversion scope
body: Convert the entire text, only selected lines, or only the text between $$$START$$$ and $$$END$$$ markers.
Scoped conversion is useful when only one heading, excerpt, or block should change while the rest stays untouched.

sections.heading: 3. Protect text that should remain unchanged
body: Use the structure controls to ignore quotes, parentheses, brackets, braces, and HTML tags before conversion runs.
Preserve existing capitalization when brand names, CamelCase terms, or technical identifiers need to stay exactly as written.

sections.heading: 4. Review before export
body: Check the analytics panel to confirm character count, word count, sentence count, and line count before downloading or copying.
If the result looks too broad, narrow the scope or adjust the skip rules and try again.

guide.ctaBody: Read the companion guide for the counters, word frequency, and sentence structure panel.

analyticsGuide.title: Text Analytics Guide
analyticsGuide.intro: The analytics panel helps you understand the size and structure of your text before you export the result.

sections.heading: 1. What the counters mean
body: Character, word, sentence, line, paragraph, and unique word counts give you a quick overview of the input text.
These counters are useful when you are preparing titles, product copy, metadata, or any text with length limits.

sections.heading: 2. Use the frequency views
body: Common words, common letters, and longest words help you spot repeated terms and unusually long terms at a glance.
That makes it easier to catch overused wording or confirm that the text still matches the expected topic.

sections.heading: 3. Read sentence structure data carefully
body: The sentence structure list groups sentences by word count and character count so you can see whether your text stays balanced.
It is especially useful when you are simplifying copy, checking formatting changes, or comparing versions of the same text.

sections.heading: 4. Use analytics as a workflow check
body: If the text includes unexpected values, unusual line breaks, or a large jump in word count, review the input before exporting.
The analytics panel works best as a quick quality check alongside the scope and style settings.

analyticsGuide.ctaBody: Open the title case and formatting guide for style choices, scope controls, and preservation tips.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
body: We do not require you to create an account to use the core functionality. We may collect certain information automatically when you visit the website.
Usage data such as pages visited and interactions, technical data like browser type and device, and ad-related data from third-party partners may be collected.
Any text you input into the case converter tool is processed only to perform the conversion operation. We do not intentionally use this content to personally identify you.

sections.heading: 2. Cookies and Similar Technologies
body: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate and improve the Service and to support advertising. You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: 3. Advertising (Google Ads / AdSense)
body: We display advertisements using Google Ads / AdSense and possibly other partners. These partners may use cookies to serve and measure ads based on your visits.

sections.heading: 4. How We Use Your Information
body: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve the Service; monitor usage and performance; protect against fraud; and display and measure ads.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services and Links
body: Our website may contain links to other websites and may use third-party services. These third parties have their own privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their practices.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
body: We retain usage and analytics information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

sections.heading: 7. Children's Privacy
body: Our Service is not directed to children under the age of 13 (or the equivalent age in your region), and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

sections.heading: 8. Security
body: We take reasonable measures to protect the information we collect. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 9. Your Choices and Rights
body: Depending on your location, you may have rights regarding your personal data, such as access, correction, deletion, or objection to certain processing. Contact us to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
paragraphs: The contents of this website are provided for general informational purposes only. We make no warranties about completeness or accuracy.

Under no circumstances shall the owners or contributors of this site be liable for any loss or damage arising from the use of this website. Use the tools provided here at your discretion and always double-check important results.
Through this website you may link to other websites which are not under our control. The inclusion of any links does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorsement.
We aim to keep the website running smoothly, but we are not liable for temporary unavailability due to technical issues beyond our control.

advertising.title: Advertising Policy
advertising.intro: This Advertising Policy explains how ads are displayed on our case converter website, how advertisers may interact with the platform, and how users can understand or control their ad experience.

sections.heading: 1. Use of Advertising
body: Ads support hosting, maintenance, and ongoing development. Ads may appear in banners, inline placements, or responsive ad blocks.
Advertisements may be served by third-party providers such as Google Ads / Google AdSense or other approved ad networks.

sections.heading: 2. Third-Party Advertising Partners
body: We use third-party vendors to display ads. These vendors may use cookies, device identifiers, or similar technologies to collect information about your visits.
These technologies help advertisers display relevant ads, measure campaign effectiveness, and limit how often a specific ad is shown.

sections.heading: 3. Types of Ads We Display
body: Examples include text-based ads, display banners, responsive units, and non-intrusive interest-based ads. We do not allow pop-ups, misleading ads, malware, or disruptive formats.

sections.heading: 4. Sponsored Content
body: Sponsored content is clearly marked and must comply with our quality and safety standards.

sections.heading: 5. Data Collection Related to Ads
body: Advertising partners may collect device information, IP address, clicks and ad interaction metrics, and navigation behavior to improve relevancy and prevent abuse.

sections.heading: 6. User Control Over Ads
body: Users may be able to opt out of personalized ads through device or browser settings, ad network opt-out links, or Google Ads personalization settings. Disabling personalized ads may result in less relevant advertising.

sections.heading: 7. Restrictions on Advertisers
body: We do not permit ads that contain malware, deceptive content, explicit material, or fraudulent schemes.

sections.heading: 8. No Endorsement
body: Displaying an advertisement does not imply our endorsement of the advertiser’s products, services, or content.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Advertising Policy
body: We may update this policy periodically. Updates will appear on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.
